name: Austal Limited
analysis: ASB has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 49% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.5000, stop A$3.7026, target A$4.9900 (0.61:1) — then trail it.
